caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" and "AN" visible, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He has his hand resting against his chin and cheek, looking slightly off-camera to the left. A professional microphone is positioned directly in front of him, and he wears a watch on his left wrist. The background features a white wall with a repeating logo and the words "EPIC HUSTLE" alongside several black stars. To his right, a screen or banner displays the word "BOSS" and the letters "K L". Overlaid on the scene is a logo for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and additional text that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and "All Rights Reserved". Across the sequence, the man remains in a nearly identical pose, with only subtle shifts in his facial expression and posture.
